name: socketsio-google-ai-toolkit
description: Full-stack Google AI toolkit: Translation (195 languages), OCR (Vision API), Text-to-Speech, and Sentiment Analysis — all via SocketsIO's unified API.
author: SocketsIO

tools.name: translate
tools.description: Translate text to any of 195 languages (Google Cloud Translation)

tools.name: bulk_translate
tools.description: Translate up to 128 texts in one call

tools.name: ocr
tools.description: Extract text from images using Google Cloud Vision API

tools.name: text_to_speech
tools.description: Convert text to audio using Google Cloud TTS (returns base64 MP3)

tools.name: analyze_sentiment
tools.description: Analyze text sentiment using Google Cloud Natural Language API

SOCKETSIO_API_KEY.description: Your SocketsIO API key. Get one free at https://socketsio.com/signup

SOCKETSIO_API_BASE.description: API base URL (optional, for self-hosted or local testing)
